steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The word “although” introduces a contradiction: the government that defaulted on debt ran a larger surplus than virtuous Britain. This clash between expectations and facts is what's intriguing.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Incongruity means a lack of harmony or agreement between incompatible things. The other three choices refer to forecasting, modeling, or authorization, not contradiction. That matches choice D — D is correct.
